batch_summary.note: S-004: explicit court documentation admission Sep 17 2025 (ROW-14367). 'My lawyer said strong case, this further demonstrates that.' Sev-2. ARC-RF12-001 Signal 2.

messages.text: My lawyer already said I had a strong case this further demonstrates that

primary_flags.classification: RF-12 primary Sev-2 — Melissa explicitly states she has an active legal strategy ('My lawyer already said I had a strong case') and declares the current exchange 'further demonstrates' it. This is the ADD-005 explicit court documentation admission: Melissa is documenting Eli's responses for her case and telling him so. High legal correlation per ADD-001: Melissa's confirmed attorney engagement (Sep 2025, RF-05 S-021) is in this same batch window. The statement is strategically placed to pressure Eli into a defensive response while simultaneously recording the exchange for legal use. ARC-RF12-001 Signal 2. ARC-RF12-001 promotes to WATCHING still (needs 3 for ACTIVE).
